projects / mechanical disc launcher

Mechanical Disc Launcher

spring-powered disc launcher — JHU MechE Freshman Design Challenge winner

Designed and built a spring-powered disc launcher for the JHU MechE Freshman Design Challenge. Won 1st place among all freshman entries judged on accuracy, range, and design elegance.

[ launcher mechanism ]
